title: Stanley Elvis Macdonald Presents Closed Mic Night
description: WORK IN PROGRESS SHOW Stanley Elvis MacDonald presents: CLOSED MIC NIGHT, a showcase of five (read: one) exciting comics from Brighton's open mic comedy scene, presented by your host and compere Stanley Elvis MacDonald. For this inaugural showing, our extra-special lineup includes: - STANLEY ELVIS MACDONALD - STANLEY ELVIS MACDONALD - STANLEY ELVIS MACDONALD - STANLEY ELVIS MACDONALD and your headliner: - STANLEY ELVIS MACDONALD All sets will be five minutes in length, presented without interval. We should be wrapped up within 45 minutes. Any profits will be split evenly between the acts. Stanley Elvis MacDonald makes no guarantee that multiple distinct comedians will perform. Please make no mention of the fact that it is called Closed Mic Night but clearly takes place in the afternoon. Bring your friends.
